fix.mechanism: Create one UTF-8 Buffer from haproxyConfigText, derive both Base64 and SHA-256 from that Buffer, then decode the payload directly to /opt/loopad/haproxy.cfg with printf and base64 -d.

commands.command: npx jest --runInBand test/perf-phase7-integration.test.ts -t 'keeps every decoded EC2 user-data payload within the launch-template limit|writes HAProxy config bytes that exactly match the published runtime fingerprint'

developmentNote: The first full test run exposed a stale test that expected HAProxy configuration plaintext in the synthesized template. The test was corrected to decode and inspect the actual embedded payload; the final full run above passed.
